Package eu.algites.lib.common.object.rendering

Class AIsRenderingOutputUtils

java.lang.Object
eu.algites.lib.common.object.rendering.AIsRenderingOutputUtils
public class AIsRenderingOutputUtils extends Object

Title: AIsRenderingOutputUtils

Description: General utilities for the Java objects functionality handling.

  • Method Details

    • isUsedRenderingOutputPurpose

      public static boolean isUsedRenderingOutputPurpose(AIiRenderingOutputPurpose aRenderingOutputPurpose)
      Gets the information if the current rendering output is user-friendly with external namings
      Parameters:
      aRenderingOutputPurpose - output purpose to be checked
      Returns:
      true if the Strings have to be produced with passed OutputPurpose parameter and false otherwise.

    • usedRenderingOutputPurpose

      public static AIiRenderingOutputPurpose usedRenderingOutputPurpose()
      Defines the currently used output purpose
      Returns:
      oputput purpose currently used

    • useRenderingOutputPurpose

      public static void useRenderingOutputPurpose(AIiRenderingOutputPurpose aRenderingOutputPurpose)
      Defines as current rendering output to be the given purpose
      Parameters:
      aRenderingOutputPurpose - purpose to be used for the rendering outputs

    • isUsedRenderingOutputFormat

      public static boolean isUsedRenderingOutputFormat(AIiRenderingOutputFormat aRenderingOutputFormat)
      Gets the information if the current rendering output is user-friendly with external namings
      Parameters:
      aRenderingOutputFormat - output format to be checked
      Returns:
      true if the Strings have to be produced with passed output format parameter and false otherwise.

    • usedRenderingOutputFormat

      public static AIiRenderingOutputFormat usedRenderingOutputFormat()
      Defines the currently used output format
      Returns:
      oputput format currently used

    • useRenderingOutputFormat

      public static void useRenderingOutputFormat(AIiRenderingOutputFormat aRenderingOutputFormat)
      Defines as current rendering output to be the given format
      Parameters:
      aRenderingOutputFormat - format to be used for the rendering outputs

    • isUsedRenderingOutputLocale

      public static boolean isUsedRenderingOutputLocale(Locale aRenderingOutputLocale)
      Gets the information if the current rendering output is user-friendly with external namings
      Parameters:
      aRenderingOutputLocale - output format to be checked
      Returns:
      true if the Strings have to be produced with passed output format parameter and false otherwise.

    • usedRenderingOutputLocale

      public static Locale usedRenderingOutputLocale()
      Defines the currently used output format
      Returns:
      oputput format currently used

    • useRenderingOutputLocale

      public static void useRenderingOutputLocale(Locale aRenderingOutputLocale)
      Defines as current rendering output to be the given format
      Parameters:
      aRenderingOutputLocale - format to be used for the rendering outputs

    • resolveStringOutput

      public static String resolveStringOutput(@NotNull @NotNull Supplier<String> aStringOutputSupplier, AIiRenderingOutputPurpose aRenderingOutputPurpose, AIiRenderingOutputFormat aRenderingOutputFormat, Locale aRenderingLocale)
      Resolves the rendering output according to the current purpose. The supplier can use the method
      Parameters:
      aStringOutputSupplier - supplier to be called, delivering the message. The supplier should ask for the message according to the current purpose returned by usage of call usedRenderingOutputPurpose() and usedRenderingOutputFormat().
      aRenderingOutputPurpose - rendering output purpose to be used for evaluation
      aRenderingOutputFormat - rendering output format to be used for evaluation
      aRenderingLocale - rendering output locale to be used for evaluation
      Returns:
      the rendering output according to the current purpose returned from the supplier
